faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Pelham Bay home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in wool clothing, silk, or upholstery; webbing in closet corners; small beige or gold-colored moths flying around; and shed larval casings near fabrics. You may also notice damage to carpets, particularly wool rugs. Our technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm infestations and identify problem areas throughout your Pelham Bay property.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth treatment cost in Pelham Bay?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Pelham Bay typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of treatments required. Minor infestations in single rooms cost less, while whole-home treatments for severe cases require more extensive service. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are highly effective against clothes moths while remaining safe for your family and pets when applied correctly.
